---
title: "Your Name"
---

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="30%"}
![](images/profile.jpg){width=200px style="border-radius: 50%;"}
:::

::: {.column width="70%"}
## About Me

Hi! I'm **Your Name**, a [PhD student / postdoc / researcher] at **Your University** in the Department of [Your Department].

I work on [brief description of your research area — e.g., "computational methods for understanding climate systems"]. I'm advised by [Advisor Name].

Before [current position], I completed my [degree] at [Previous Institution].

### Contact

- 📧 [your.email@university.edu](mailto:your.email@university.edu)
- 🐦 [@yourhandle](https://twitter.com/yourhandle)
- 💼 [GitHub](https://github.com/yourusername)
- 🎓 [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com)
:::

::::
